targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at AS time, composite_score AS "EN Quality" FROM translation_quality WHERE target_lang = 'en' ORDER BY created_at
SELECT created_at AS time, composite_score AS "JP Quality" FROM translation_quality WHERE target_lang = 'jp' ORDER BY created_at

SELECT started_at AS time, CASE WHEN (cached_sections + new_sections) > 0 THEN cached_sections::float / (cached_sections + new_sections) ELSE 0 END AS "Cache Hit Rate" FROM pipeline_runs WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY started_at
SELECT date_trunc('month', started_at) AS time, SUM(estimated_cost) AS "Cost ($)" FROM pipeline_runs WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY date_trunc('month', started_at) ORDER BY time

SELECT id AS "Run", status AS "Status", total_files AS "Files", cached_sections AS "Cached", new_sections AS "New", ROUND(gpu_time_sec::numeric, 1) AS "GPU Time (s)", ROUND(estimated_cost::numeric, 4) AS "Cost ($)", started_at AS "Started" FROM pipeline_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT filename AS "File", target_lang AS "Lang", ROUND(structural_score::numeric, 3) AS "Structural", ROUND(length_score::numeric, 3) AS "Length", ROUND(semantic_score::numeric, 3) AS "Anti-Hallucination", ROUND(glossary_score::numeric, 3) AS "Glossary", ROUND(composite_score::numeric, 3) AS "Composite", passed AS "Passed", created_at AS "Time" FROM translation_quality ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT week_start AS "Week", posts_translated AS "Posts", total_sections AS "Sections", ROUND((cache_hit_rate * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Cache %", ROUND(avg_quality_en::numeric, 3) AS "EN Quality", ROUND(avg_quality_jp::numeric, 3) AS "JP Quality", ROUND(total_gpu_time_sec::numeric, 1) AS "GPU Time (s)", ROUND(total_cost::numeric, 4) AS "Cost ($)" FROM weekly_reports ORDER BY week_start DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT filename AS "File", target_lang AS "Lang", ROUND(composite_score::numeric, 3) AS "Score", ROUND(structural_score::numeric, 3) AS "Structural", ROUND(glossary_score::numeric, 3) AS "Glossary", created_at AS "Time" FROM translation_quality WHERE passed = false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
